_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: Tumor formation was never observed for the NF1-proficient cell lines. In contrast, all NF1-deficient lines showed the ability to form tumors upon xenograft, with 50% penetrance
details: NF1-deficient iHSCs formed tumors with 50% penetrance in athymic nude mice, while NF1-proficient lines never formed tumors
